languages.title: Luambo
languages.subtitle: Khethani luambo lune lwa shumiswa kha app yoṱhe.
languages.noResults: A hu na nyambo dzine dza tshimbilelana na ṱhoḓisiso yaṋu.

phone.label: Nomboro ya luṱingo
phone.searchCountry: Setsha shango, khoudu, kana ṱhoho ya u daela
phone.noCountries: A hu na mashango a fanaho na ṱhoḓisiso yaṋu.
phone.tooShort: Nomboro iyi ya luṱingo ndi pfufhi vhukuma.
phone.tooLong: Nomboro iyi ya luṱingo ndi ndapfu vhukuma.
phone.invalid: Ṅwalani nomboro ya luṱingo i shumaho ya shango ḽo khethiwaho.
phone.valid: Nomboro ya luṱingo ya dzitshaka i shumaho

auth.onboardingTagline: Mufarisi wa tsireledzo ya muthu nga eṱhe kha zwifhinga zwi re vhukati ha “Ndi khwine” na “Ndi ṱoḓa thuso.”
auth.continueOnboarding: Isa phanda na u dzhena kha tshikepe
auth.createSubtitle: Khethani nḓila ya u dzhena u itela u tsireledza girafu yaṋu ya tsireledzo.
auth.signInFailedMessage: A ro ngo kona u fhedza u dzhena. Sedzani vhukwamani haṋu nahone ni lingedze hafhu.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google U dzhena a hu wanali
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: U shumisa sesheni ya mveledziso yapo. Native Google Sign-In i shuma kha u fhaṱa ha mveledziso.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair zwino kana ni bvele phanḓa na u engedza nga murahu.
auth.northStarBody: The VL01 wearable i nga bveledza u elela ha tsireledzo nga dzipompo na zwiga zwa u tsitsa zwilapfu.
auth.setupJewelry: U dzudzanya zwithu zwa u ḓiṱama
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Mufarisi waṋu wa tsireledzo wa vhulenda kha mapa na kha dzifounu.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear i nga thusa kha moudu wa hayani, moudu wa muṱhogomeli, moudu wa shishi, u founa ha tshiitisi, na thikhedzo ya ipfi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: I shumiswa kha mapa, fhethu ha khombo, u swika ho tsireledzeaho, na SOS nyimele.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving i humbela fhethu uri vhaṱhogomeli vha kone u pfesesa hune thuso ya nga ṱoḓea hone. Ni nga shandula zwenezwi nga murahu kha Zwishumiswa.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Nḓivhadzo dzi tikedza u ṱola na zwiitea zwa shishi.
permissions.notificationsBody: Ri shumisa fhedzi nḓivhadzo dza ṱhuṱhuwedzo dza tsireledzo, mvelaphanḓa dza shishi, na khumbudzo dzine na dzi tendela.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Fhethu hu ita uri nyimele ya tsireledzo i dzule yo tea
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving i shumisa fhethu haṋu kha mapa wa tsireledzo, fhethu ha khombo, u kovhelana nga u ṱavhanya, na SOS vhuimo. Ni nga shandula zwenezwi nga murahu kha Zwishumiswa.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Nḓivhadzo dza tsireledzo dzi ṱoḓa nḓivhadzo
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving i rumela khumbudzo dza u dzhena, mvelaphanḓa dza shishi, na ṱhuṱhuwedzo dza tsireledzo dzine na dzi tendela. A ri shumisi nḓivhadzo dza u ḓivhadza.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Maikrofoni i ṋea maanḓa kha u vhidzelela ha tsireledzo
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving u shumisa maikrofoni yaṋu fhedzi musi ni tshi thoma AI khonani kana luṱingo lwa tsireledzo.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving i shumisa Bluetooth u ṱanganya na NorthStar zwithu zwa u ḓiṱama, u vhala tshiimo tsha vhuṱumani, na u ṱuṱuwedza u elela ha tsireledzo u bva kha zwiambaro.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving i shumisa khamera fhedzi musi ni tshi nanga u dzhia tshinepe tsha phurofaili kana u kovhelana tshifanyiso tsha tsireledzo.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving i ita uri u elela uhu hu dzule hu hone u bva kha Zwiṱirathedzhi na kha dashibodo.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khethani ipfi ḽa khonani ḽine ḽa pfa ḽo tsireledzea u ḽi pfa.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: U monithara ho dzikaho u itela tsireledzo ya ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: U kovhelana vhubvo na vhathu vhane vha vha fulufhela.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Pompo ṱhanu dzi nga gonya dza swika kha SOS na tsivhudzo dza vhalindi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: U sika tshiitisi tsha vhulenda tsha u ṱutshela nyimele i sa takadzi.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Thomani luṱingo lwa khonani lwa tshifhinga tsha vhukuma musi ni tshi ṱoḓa thikhedzo.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Lingedzani u elela ha tsireledzo kha demo ya mutsiko wa fhasi.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Vheani zwithu zwa u ḓiṱama tsini musi ni tshi khou ṱola.
jewelry.noDevices: A hu athu wanala zwishumiswa zwa tsini NorthStar.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth u ṱola a zwo ngo kona u thoma. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
jewelry.scanFailed: A ro ngo wana zwithu zwa u ḓiṱama tsini. Sedzani Bluetooth, ni dzule no vala NorthStar, ni lingedze hafhu.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth u ṱola a zwo ngo kona u thoma. Sedzani Bluetooth access ni lingedze hafhu.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Tswikelelo ya tshishumiswa tsha tsini yo dzimiwa. Tendelani Bluetooth u swikelela kha Zwiṱirathedzhi, nga murahu ni lingedze hafhu.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar zwo dzhia tshifhinga tshilapfu u ṱangana. I sendedzeni tsini ni lingedze hafhu.
jewelry.connectFailed: A ro ngo kona u ṱangana na NorthStar. Sedzani uri yo chargeiwa nahone i tsini, ni lingedze hafhu.
jewelry.emptyTitle: A hu athu vha na zwishumiswa zwa tsini
jewelry.emptyMessage: Dzulani no NorthStar no charge na tsini na founu iyi, ni kone u dovha na scan.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Ndi khou toda NorthStar zwishumiswa tsini...

home.subtitle: Dashibodo ya khonani ya tsireledzo
home.readyBody: Ipfi, mapa, zwithu zwa u ḓiṱama, na vhalindi zwi kule nga pompo nthihi.
home.noDevice: A hu na tshishumiswa tsho ṱumanaho

map.title: Mapa wa tsireledzo
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ṱhoḓisiso; Mapbox i ṋea kha mveledziso ya u fhaṱa.
map.updateFailed: A ro ngo kona u ḓivhadza vhupo haṋu. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
map.notRequested: U swikelela fhethu a zwo ngo humbelwa. Ni nga i vula nga murahu u bva kha Settings.
map.permissionOff: U swikelela fhethu ho dzima. I tendeleni kha Settings u itela u vhea mapa wa tsireledzo vhukati ha inwi.
map.timeout: Fhethu hune na vha hone hu khou dzhia tshifhinga tshilapfu u fhira zwe zwa vha zwo lavhelelwa. Sudzuluwani fhethu hune ha vha na tshiga tshi vhonalaho nahone ni lingedze hafhu.
map.savedEmptyTitle: A hu athu vhulungea fhethu ho vhulungwaho
map.savedEmptyMessage: Fhethu hune ha fulufhedzea hune na vhulunga hu ḓo bvelela hafha u itela u ṱavhanya u swikelela.

zones.crowding: U ḓala ha vhathu vhusiku vhuhulu
zones.lowLighting: Fhethu hune ha vha na tshedza tshiṱuku

map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: u ṱumana zwavhuḓi na khonani yaṋu ya ipfi...
safetyCall.useOffline: Shumisani khonani i siho kha inthanethe
safetyCall.reconnect: U ṱumanya hafhu na ipfi AI
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Type arali u amba zwi tshi konḓa .
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Thomani luṱingo kana ni ṅwale mulaedza musi no no ḓilugisela.

history.clearMessage: Izwi zwi bvisa milaedza ya khonani yo vhulungwaho ya AI kha tshishumiswa itshi.
history.cannotUndo: Hezwi a zwi nga ḓo vhuyedzedzwa murahu.
history.title: Ḓivhazwakale ya nyambedzano
history.subtitle: AI milaedza ya khonani yo vhulungwaho kha tshishumiswa itshi.
history.emptyTitle: A hu athu vha na nyambedzano
history.emptyMessage: Nyambedzano dzaṋu dza AI dza khonani dzi ḓo bvelela hafha nga murahu ha u founa haṋu ha u thoma.
history.loadFailed: A ro ngo kona u dzhia ḓivhazwakale ya nyambedzano. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
history.clearFailed: A ro ngo kona u bvisa ḓivhazwakale ya nyambedzano. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
history.deleteFailed: A ro ngo kona u phumula nyambedzano yeneyo. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.

voices.title: Maipfi anga a u vhidzelela a tsireledzo
voices.subtitle: Khethani ipfi ḽa khonani ḽine na pfa ḽo tea u ḽi pfa.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze u nanga ipfi hafhu.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Tsumbo iyi ya ipfi a yo ngo kona u lidziwa. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.

capybara.name: Capybear
capybara.description: yo dzikaho, yo dzikaho, yo khwaṱhaho

boyfriend.name: Muthannga
boyfriend.description: u dzika, lufuno, u vha hone

muscleMan.name: Munna wa misipha
muscleMan.description: u ḓifulufhela, u tsireledza, u ṱuṱuwedza

settings.offlineMode: Moudu wa u sa vha kha inthanethe
settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Shumisani phindulo dza khonani dzo ṱanganaho musi nethiweke kana Hume zwidodombedzwa zwi siho.
settings.privacyBody: Export kana u phumula data yapo yo vhulungwaho kha tshishumiswa itshi.
settings.exportFailedMessage: A vha koni u rumela data yavho nnḓa zwa zwino.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Izwi zwi bvisa phrofaili yaṋu, zwishumiswa, vhukwamani ha shishi, ḓivhazwakale ya nyambedzano, khumbudzo dza thendelo, na sesheni ya vhuṱanzi hapo kha tshishumiswa itshi.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: A zwi koni u thutha data yapo zwa zwino.
settings.linkFailed: A thi koni u vula vhuṱumani

sections.languageSubtitle: Luambo lwa vhukwamani na thendelo ya sisiṱeme
sections.companionSubtitle: Ipfi na zwine na zwi takalela zwi siho kha inthanethe

sections.accountSubtitle: Sesheni yaṋu ya zwino ya VeryLoving

settings.updateFailedMessage: A ro ngo kona u vhulunga zwenezwo zwine ra zwi takalela. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sesheni yaṋu i kha ḓi shuma. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.

contacts.title: Vhukwamani ha shishi
contacts.subtitle: Vhathu vha fulufhedzeaho vhane vha vha hone nga tshifhinga tsha u elela ha tsireledzo.
contacts.name: Dzina
contacts.phone: Nomboro ya luṱingo ya u kwama
contacts.empty: A hu athu engedzwa vhukwamani ha shishi.
contacts.emptyTitle: A hu athu vha na vhukwamani ha shishi
contacts.emptyMessage: Engedzani muthu ane na mu fulufhela uri vha vhe vho lugela musi safety flow i tshi vha ṱoḓa.
contacts.removeMessage: Muthu uyu ha tsha ḓo bvelela kha u elela haṋu ha shishi.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: A ro ngo kona u vhulunga vhukwamani uhu. Sedzani zwidodombedzwa nahone ni lingedze hafhu.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: A ro ngo kona u bvisa vhukwamani uhu. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.

device.title: Ndangulo ya tshishumiswa
device.subtitle: Langulani tshishumiswa tshaṋu tsha NorthStar.
device.none: A hu na zwishumiswa zwo ṱumanaho

friends.title: Khonani
friends.subtitle: Vhaṱhogomeli, khumbelo, na girafu ya shishi.
friends.emptyTitle: Tshidimela tsha tsireledzo yavho a tshi na tshithu
friends.emptyMessage: Khonani dzi fulufhedzeaho na vhaṱhogomeli vha ḓo bvelela hafha musi vho no engedzwa.

emergency.title: Tshiimo tsha shishi SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate fhedzi musi ni tshi ṱoḓa thikhedzo nga u ṱavhanya.
emergency.body: Hezwi zwi ḓo ḓivhadza u elela haṋu ha tsireledzo na u lugisela vhukwamani ha shishi.
emergency.notificationBody: U elela haṋu ha shishi ho no lugela.
emergency.addContact: Engedza vhukwamani ha shishi kha Zwiṱirathedzhi.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub ya u kovhelana fhethu yo lugela. Kha vha ṱume backend ya u kovhelana endpoint u rumela vhuṱumani vhu tshilaho.

quickShare.title: U kovhelana nga u ṱavhanya
quickShare.subtitle: U elela ha mukovhe wa fhethu ho lugela.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pompo
capybearTap.subtitle: Kha vha ṱoḓe luvhili NorthStar yavho u itela u wisela muṱokola wa tsireledzo.
capybearTap.body: Nḓila ya zwanḓa yo lugela u ṱanganya dzithambo dza zwiitea zwa BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: U vhonala a siho kha inthanethe. Mulaedza waṋu u ḓo rumelwa musi ni tshi dovha na ṱangana.
errors.voiceQueued: Mulaedza wo vhulungea. I ḓo rumelwa musi khonani ya ipfi i tshi dovha ya ṱangana.
errors.voiceRetrying: Ndi khou lingedza u rumela mulaedza wavho hafhu...
errors.voiceConnecting: U ṱumanya zwavhuḓi na khonani yaṋu ya ipfi...
errors.microphone: U swikelela maikrofoni zwi a ṱoḓea kha u founa nga ipfi. Ni nga i vula kha Settings, kana na ṅwala mulaedza nṱhani hazwo.
errors.billing: Mufarisi wa ipfi wa inthanethe ha wanali lwa tshifhinganyana. U nga bvela phanḓa na khonani i siho kha inthanethe.
errors.authentication: Mufarisi wa ipfi ha ngo kona u khwaṱhisedza sesheni iyi. Kha vha saine hafhu kana vha shumise khonani i siho kha inthanethe zwa zwino.
errors.timeout: Mufarisi wa ipfi o dzhia tshifhinga tshilapfu u fhindula. Sedzani vhukwamani haṋu nahone ni lingedze hafhu.
errors.network: Ro vha ri sa koni u swikelela khonani ya ipfi. Sedzani vhukwamani haṋu, ni lingedze hafhu kana ni bvele phanḓa ni si kha inthanethe.
errors.genericVoice: Hu na tshithu tsho thithisaho luṱingo lwa ipfi. Lingedzani hafhu, kana ni bvele phanḓa na khonani i siho kha inthanethe.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving i ṱoḓa tswikelelo ya maikrofoni u itela tsireledzo na AI dzifounu dza khonani.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving u shumisa fhethu haṋu kha mapa wa tsireledzo na zwishumiswa zwa tsireledzo zwa tsini.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving i shumisa Bluetooth u ṱumanya na NorthStar yaṋu ya tsireledzo ya zwithu zwa u ḓiṱama.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Nḓila iyi ya u dzhena a i wanali kha ino build.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Bvelani phanḓa sa demo (ya mveledziso fhedzi)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo mode i shumisa data ya mazwifhi ya henefhano fhedzi. Tshumelo dzo ṱumanywaho a dzi athu khwaṱhisedzwa, nahone session iyi i a thomiwa hafhu musi app i tshi dzheniswa hafhu.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Khoudu ya u khwaṱhisedza a i shumi kana yo fhelelwa nga tshifhinga. Humbelani khoudu ntswa ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: No lingedza u dzhena lunzhi nga maanḓa. Lindelani nyana, ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: U khwaṱhisedza u dzhena zwo dzhia tshifhinga tshilapfu. Sedzani ṱhumanyo yaṋu ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: A ro ngo kona u swikelela tshumelo ya u dzhena. Sedzani ṱhumanyo yaṋu ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Session yaṋu yo fhelelwa nga tshifhinga. Dzhena hafhu.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Mapa wa tsireledzo a wo ngo kona u dzheniswa. Sedzani ṱhumanyo yaṋu ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Vhupo ha zwino a vhu wanali. Hu khou sumbedzwa vhupo haṋu ha u fhedzisela ho vhulungwaho u bva kha %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: A ro ngo kona u kovhana vhupo haṋu. Sedzani thendelo ya vhupo ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Vhupo hanga ho rekhodiwaho nga %{capturedAt} ndi hovhu:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Vhupo hanga ha u fhedzisela ho vhulungwaho, ho rekhodiwaho nga %{capturedAt}, ndi hovhu:
releaseCritical.blePermission: U swikelela Bluetooth ho tsimiwa. Hu tendeleni kha Settings, ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth yo tsimiwa. I funguleni, ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: U ṱumanya Bluetooth a hu wanali kha tshishumiswa kana build iyi.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: A ro ngo kona u wana NorthStar. I vheeni tsini, ni sedze Bluetooth, ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: A hu ngo wanala zwishumiswa zwa NorthStar tsini. I vheeni tsini ni ṱoḓe hafhu.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: A ro ngo kona u ṱumana na NorthStar. I dzule yo tshadzhiwa nahone i tsini, ni lingedze hafhu.
releaseCritical.saveCurrentPlace: Vhulungani fhethu hune na vha hone
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: A ro ngo kona u vhulunga fhethu afha. Lingedzani hafhu.
releaseCritical.lastSOSAttempt: U lingedza SOS ha u fhedzisela
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Tshidaela tsha luṱingo tsho vulea; luṱingo a lu ngo khwaṱhisedzwa.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Zwo fheliswa; a hu ngo itwa luṱingo.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ho vha hu si na muthu wa vhuṱumani ha shishi; a hu ngo itwa luṱingo.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Tshidaela tsha luṱingo a tsho ngo kona u vulea; a hu ngo itwa luṱingo.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: U lingedza SOS ha u fhedzisela a ho ngo kona u khwaṱhisedzwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Muthusi wa ipfi ha wanali zwino. Lingedzani hafhu nga murahu kana ni bvele phanḓa na muthusi a sa shumisi inthanethe.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Lulamisani muthu wa vhuṱumani ha shishi
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Muthu wa vhuṱumani ha shishi o khwinifhadzwa.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
